name: Bio Petactive Natural Honey Cat Shampoo 400ml
description: Bio Petactive Natural Honey Cat is a care shampoo for densley furred cat, to make it easier for wet and dry brushing. Its honey essence imparts extra shine and softness by nourishing the skin and fur. Its pH balanced formulation and effective moisturizing property keeps the skin moist and prevents dryness. Usage: Soak the body of your cat in warm water prior to application. Dilute the amount of product 1:5 with water then rub to spread the foam throughout the body of your cat. Start shampooing and washing on the back. To get the best results, wait for 3 to 5 minutes until the shampoo thoroughly soaks into the cat?s fur. Then rinse and dry with a towel and groom its fur.
